examples: The townsfolk can't understand why the Royal Shakespeare Company needs a subsidy.
The townsfolk don't see it this way and the local council does not contribute directly to the subsidy of the Royal Shakespeare Company.
And there are the townsfolk who largely live off the tourists who come, not to see the plays, but to look at Anne Hathaway's Cottage, Shakespeare's birthplace and the other sights.
Townsfolk and visitors sat lakeside and watched 90-foot geysers illuminated by various colored lights.
It also has a few bars, a few dusty shops, and scores of inquisitive townsfolk.
